name: interview-knowledge-search
description: 面试知识快速检索网站（React + Vite 前端 / TypeScript + Express + SQLite 后端）

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix desktop install
scripts.build: npm --prefix web run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.desktop: npm run build:desktop && npm --prefix desktop start
scripts.dist:dmg: npm run build:desktop && npm --prefix desktop run dist:dmg
scripts.dist:dmg:publish: npm run build:desktop && npm --prefix desktop run dist:publish
